nasb.text: I am writing to you, fathers, because you know Him who has been from the beginning. I am writing to you, young men, because you have overcome the evil one. I have written to you, children, because you know the Father.

esv.text: I am writing to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I am writing to you, young men, because you have overcome the evil one. I write to you, children, because you know the Father.

cnv.text: 父老們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們認識太初就存在的那一位。 青年們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們已經勝過那惡者。

ccb.text: 父老们，我写信给你们，因为你们认识了从太初就存在的那位。年轻人，我写信给你们，因为你们已经战胜了那恶者。

csbs.text: 父老们哪，我写信给你们， 因为你们已经认识了从太初就有的那一位； 年轻人哪，我写信给你们， 因为你们已经胜过了那恶者。
